title: gladiolus negeliensis
intro: Gladiolus negeliensis, commonly known as the 'sword lily', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus negeliensis are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
